title: WeWork India is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: WeWork India is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
WeWork India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Property Advisor for our Bhopal operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About WeWork India:
WeWork India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with WeWork India!
